user_prompt: Hold off escalating — let me try one more reply first. Draft something more empathetic.
actual_output:
**Got it — holding off on any escalation.**

Please share the customer's latest message (or the previous draft I gave you), along with any relevant context like their name, what they've already tried, and the core issue. I'll draft a warmer, more empathetic reply right away that acknowledges their frustration first and focuses on helping them feel truly heard.
judge_reasoning: The chatbot complied with the instruction to pause escalation and offered to draft the requested empathetic response once the user provides the necessary context.
